summary: Full backend + frontend testing of SIGIP IPAM. Backend pytest suite (41 tests) covers auth (admin/tecnico/consulta), JWT bcrypt, RBAC, CRUD (departamentos/secciones/segmentos/equipos/usuarios), generar-ips (RN-04=254 & RN-03 duplicate), IP state changes, historial, asignaciones (RN-01 unauthorized segment, RN-02 already-occupied, RN-05 equipo second IP), reasignar, liberar, bitacora, exports (Excel/PDF). All 41 tests pass (100%). Frontend Playwright verified login flow, wrong-password toast, dashboard cards/pie/bar/segments/last-assignments, role-based nav visibility (consulta hides Usuarios + Bitacora and add-btn; tecnico hides Usuarios only), theme toggle, navigation across all modules.
critical_code_review_comments: CORS_ORIGINS='*' with allow_credentials=True: browsers ignore Access-Control-Allow-Origin='*' when credentials=include; SIGIP frontend uses withCredentials via axios cookie, so tighten CORS_ORIGINS to explicit preview URL(s) in prod. Currently works because axios also sends Authorization Bearer from localStorage.
Cookies set with secure=False. For production HTTPS deployments set secure=True and samesite='none' so httpOnly cookies work cross-site.
No brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login (playbook mentions lockout after 5 fails). Not implemented; consider adding rate-limit / attempts counter.

register_crud closes over `Model`; multiple registrations rely on late binding of variables. FastAPI captures via default args of endpoint sig - OK, but Pydantic model reused as parameter default is fine. No functional issue observed.
list_segmentos loads ALL segments then paginates in memory (to_list(1000)) and does N IP count queries per row - fine for small data but O(N) for scale. Consider aggregation.

reasignar_ip reuses liberar_ip/asignar_ip which call HTTPException; if second call fails after liberating, the equipo is left without IP but original asig is liberated. Consider a transaction or explicit rollback message.
list_ips does not sort in Mongo, sorts in-memory only on the current page (skip/limit before sort) so ordering across pages is inconsistent. Consider sorting via aggregation on last octet.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed segments/departments/equipos/usuarios; segments not deleted because they contain occupied IPs after assignment tests. Not harmful but leaves residue in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully covered by /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (41 tests, 100% pass, ~6s runtime). Uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Frontend Playwright quick smoke passes for role-based nav, dashboard cards + charts, wrong-password toast, theme toggle. For deeper frontend CRUD dialogs testing (Nuevo Segmento/generar-ips button flow through modal, Autorizar Departamentos dialog, Asignar IP modal with 3-level cascade), main agent may add more scripted Playwright coverage.
rca of the issue: No issues found. All 14 requested feature scenarios verified as working end-to-end.
